title: JSONB field for flexible metadata
prompt: MyApp.Analytics.Event should have a :metadata field that stores arbitrary JSON (typed :map in Elixir, :jsonb in Postgres). Write both the schema and the migration. Migration must declare `add :metadata, :map`. Schema declares `field :metadata, :map`. Write schema to lib/my_app/analytics/event.ex and migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260412700000_create_events.exs.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing :map maps to Postgres jsonb. Sonnet sometimes reaches for :string + Jason.
